results.question: Which areas had higher agriculture, forestry, fishing, and hunting weekly wages in the first quarter of 1994 than in the first quarter of 1990, and how much did wages increase?
results.sql:
SELECT 
    t1994.area_fips,
    (t1994.avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting - t1990.avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting) AS wage_increase
FROM 
    t_1994_q1 t1994
JOIN 
    t_1990_q1 t1990 
    ON t1994.area_fips = t1990.area_fips
WHERE 
    t1994.avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting > t1990.avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting
results.query_family_reason: latest/earliest per entity (implicit)

response.question: Which areas had higher agriculture, forestry, fishing, and hunting weekly wages in the first quarter of 1994 than in the first quarter of 1990, and how much did wages increase?
response.query_family_reason: latest/earliest per entity (implicit)

results.question: Which areas gained agriculture, forestry, fishing, and hunting establishments between the first quarter of 1990 and the first quarter of 1994?
results.sql:
SELECT t1.geoid, t1.area_fips
FROM t_1990_q1 t1
JOIN t_1994_q1 t2 ON t1.geoid = t2.geoid
WHERE t2.qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting > t1.qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting

results.question: Which areas had the single largest drop in agriculture, forestry, fishing, and hunting weekly wages between the second quarter of 1990 and the second quarter of 1994?
results.sql:
SELECT
    t1990.area_fips
FROM t_1990_q2 t1990
JOIN t_1994_q2 t1994 ON t1990.area_fips = t1994.area_fips
WHERE (t1990.avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting - t1994.avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting) = (
    SELECT MAX(t1990_inner.avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting - t1994_inner.avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting)
    FROM t_1990_q2 t1990_inner
    JOIN t_1994_q2 t1994_inner ON t1990_inner.area_fips = t1994_inner.area_fips
    WHERE t1990_inner.avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting - t1994_inner.avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting > 0
)
ORDER BY t1990.area_fips
results.query_family_reason: no distinctive relational pattern; use base pipeline

results.question: Which areas had the same agriculture, forestry, fishing, and hunting establishment count in the third quarter of 1991 and the third quarter of 1993, but different weekly wages?
results.sql:
SELECT t1.geoid, t1.area_fips
FROM t_1991_q3 AS t1
JOIN t_1993_q3 AS t2
  ON t1.geoid = t2.geoid
WHERE t1.qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting = t2.qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting
  AND t1.avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting != t2.avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting

results.question: Which areas had a 1991 total agriculture, forestry, fishing, and hunting establishment count above the average 1991 total across all areas?
results.sql:
SELECT area_fips
FROM (
  SELECT 
    area_fips,
    SUM(qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting) AS total_estabs
  FROM (
    SELECT area_fips, qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting FROM t_1991_q1
    UNION ALL
    SELECT area_fips, qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting FROM t_1991_q2
    UNION ALL
    SELECT area_fips, qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting FROM t_1991_q3
    UNION ALL
    SELECT area_fips, qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting FROM t_1991_q4
  )
  GROUP BY area_fips
)
WHERE total_estabs > (
  SELECT AVG(total_estabs)
  FROM (
    SELECT 
      area_fips,
      SUM(qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting) AS total_estabs
    FROM (
      SELECT area_fips, qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting FROM t_1991_q1
      UNION ALL
      SELECT area_fips, qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting FROM t_1991_q2
      UNION ALL
      SELECT area_fips, qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting FROM t_1991_q3
      UNION ALL
      SELECT area_fips, qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting FROM t_1991_q4
    )
    GROUP BY area_fips
  )
)

    SELECT avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting FROM t_1991_q2

    UNION ALL

  )
),
area_avg AS (
  SELECT 
    geoid,
    AVG(avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting) AS area_avg_wage
  FROM (
    SELECT geoid, avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting FROM t_1991_q1
    UNION ALL
    SELECT geoid, avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting FROM t_1991_q2
    UNION ALL
    SELECT geoid, avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting FROM t_1991_q3
    UNION ALL
    SELECT geoid, avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting FROM t_1991_q4
  )

)

WHERE area_avg_wage > (SELECT overall_avg FROM yearly_wage)

FROM t_1990_q1 t1990
JOIN t_1994_q1 t1994 ON t1990.geoid = t1994.geoid
WHERE t1994.avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting > t1990.avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting
AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM t_1990_q1 t1990_check
    WHERE t1990_check.geoid = t1990.geoid
    AND t1990_check.avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting >= t1990.avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting
)

    WHERE t1994_check.geoid = t1994.geoid
    AND t1994_check.avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting <= t1994.avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting
)
GROUP BY t1990.geoid, t1990.area_fips

results.question: Which areas had their highest third-quarter agriculture, forestry, fishing, and hunting establishment count in 1993 compared with the third quarters from 1990 through 1994?
results.sql:
SELECT area_fips
FROM (
    SELECT area_fips,
           qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting AS estabs_1993_q3,
           (SELECT MAX(est) FROM (
               SELECT qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting AS est FROM t_1990_q3 WHERE area_fips = t_1993_q3.area_fips
               UNION ALL
               SELECT qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting AS est FROM t_1990_q4 WHERE area_fips = t_1993_q3.area_fips
               UNION ALL
               SELECT qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting AS est FROM t_1990_q1 WHERE area_fips = t_1993_q3.area_fips
               UNION ALL
               SELECT qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting AS est FROM t_1990_q2 WHERE area_fips = t_1993_q3.area_fips
               UNION ALL
               SELECT qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting AS est FROM t_1993_q1 WHERE area_fips = t_1993_q3.area_fips
               UNION ALL
               SELECT qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting AS est FROM t_1993_q2 WHERE area_fips = t_1993_q3.area_fips
               UNION ALL
               SELECT qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting AS est FROM t_1993_q4 WHERE area_fips = t_1993_q3.area_fips
           )) AS max_estabs
    FROM t_1993_q3
)
WHERE estabs_1993_q3 = max_estabs

  AND t1994.qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting >= t1990.qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting * 1.25

results.question: Which areas had above-average agriculture, forestry, fishing, and hunting weekly wages in both the first quarter of 1990 and the first quarter of 1994?

SELECT t1990.geoid, t1990.area_fips
FROM t_1990_q1 AS t1990
JOIN t_1994_q1 AS t1994
  ON t1990.geoid = t1994.geoid

)

    SELECT AVG(avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting)
    FROM t_1994_q1
)

results.question: Which areas moved from below-average agriculture, forestry, fishing, and hunting weekly wages in the first quarter of 1990 to above-average wages in the first quarter of 1994?
results.sql:
WITH q1_1990_avg AS (
    SELECT AVG(avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting) AS avg_wage
    FROM t_1990_q1
),
q1_1994_avg AS (
    SELECT AVG(avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting) AS avg_wage
    FROM t_1994_q1
),
areas_below_1990 AS (
    SELECT geoid
    FROM t_1990_q1, q1_1990_avg
    WHERE avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting < q1_1990_avg.avg_wage
),
areas_above_1994 AS (
    SELECT geoid
    FROM t_1994_q1, q1_1994_avg
    WHERE avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting > q1_1994_avg.avg_wage
)
SELECT a.geoid
FROM areas_below_1990 a
JOIN areas_above_1994 b ON a.geoid = b.geoid
JOIN t_1990_q2 c ON a.geoid = c.geoid
JOIN t_1990_q3 d ON a.geoid = d.geoid
JOIN t_1990_q4 e ON a.geoid = e.geoid
JOIN t_1994_q2 f ON a.geoid = f.geoid
JOIN t_1994_q3 g ON a.geoid = g.geoid
JOIN t_1994_q4 h ON a.geoid = h.geoid
results.query_family_reason: latest/earliest per entity (implicit)

response.question: Which areas moved from below-average agriculture, forestry, fishing, and hunting weekly wages in the first quarter of 1990 to above-average wages in the first quarter of 1994?
response.query_family_reason: latest/earliest per entity (implicit)

results.sql:
WITH q1_1990_avg AS (
    SELECT AVG(qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting) AS avg_val
    FROM t_1990_q1
),
q1_1994_avg AS (
    SELECT AVG(qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting) AS avg_val
    FROM t_1994_q1
),
above_avg_1990 AS (
    SELECT t1.geoid
    FROM t_1990_q1 t1
    CROSS JOIN q1_1990_avg a
    WHERE t1.qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting > a.avg_val
),
below_avg_1994 AS (
    SELECT t4.geoid
    FROM t_1994_q1 t4
    CROSS JOIN q1_1994_avg b
    WHERE t4.qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting < b.avg_val
)
SELECT a.geoid
FROM above_avg_1990 a
INNER JOIN below_avg_1994 b ON a.geoid = b.geoid

results.question: For each area, which quarter of 1990 had the highest agriculture, forestry, fishing, and hunting weekly wage?
results.sql:
WITH q1_wages AS (
    SELECT geoid, area_fips, avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting AS wage, 1 AS qtr
    FROM t_1990_q1
),
q2_wages AS (
    SELECT geoid, area_fips, avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting AS wage, 2 AS qtr
    FROM t_1990_q2
),
q3_wages AS (
    SELECT geoid, area_fips, avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting AS wage, 3 AS qtr
    FROM t_1990_q3
),
q4_wages AS (
    SELECT geoid, area_fips, avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting AS wage, 4 AS qtr
    FROM t_1990_q4
),
all_wages AS (
    SELECT * FROM q1_wages
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM q2_wages
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM q3_wages
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM q4_wages
),
ranked AS (
    SELECT 
        geoid,
        area_fips,
        qtr,
        wage,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY area_fips ORDER BY wage DESC, qtr ASC) AS rn
    FROM all_wages
)
SELECT geoid, area_fips, qtr
FROM ranked
WHERE rn = 1

WITH combined AS (
  SELECT area_fips, 'Q1' AS quarter, qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting AS estabs FROM t_1990_q1
  UNION ALL
  SELECT area_fips, 'Q2' AS quarter, qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting AS estabs FROM t_1990_q2
  UNION ALL
  SELECT area_fips, 'Q3' AS quarter, qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting AS estabs FROM t_1990_q3
  UNION ALL
  SELECT area_fips, 'Q4' AS quarter, qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting AS estabs FROM t_1990_q4
),
min_estabs AS (
  SELECT area_fips, MIN(estabs) AS min_est
  FROM combined
  GROUP BY area_fips
)

results.question: Which areas had agriculture, forestry, fishing, and hunting weekly wages in 1994 that were above the average of all their 1990 quarterly wages?
results.sql:
SELECT t1994.area_fips
FROM t_1994_q1 t1994
JOIN t_1990_q1 t1990q1 ON t1994.area_fips = t1990q1.area_fips
JOIN t_1990_q2 t1990q2 ON t1994.area_fips = t1990q2.area_fips
JOIN t_1990_q3 t1990q3 ON t1994.area_fips = t1990q3.area_fips
JOIN t_1990_q4 t1990q4 ON t1994.area_fips = t1990q4.area_fips
WHERE t1994.avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting > (
    (t1990q1.avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting +
     t1990q2.avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting +
     t1990q3.avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting +
     t1990q4.avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting) / 4.0
)
GROUP BY t1994.area_fips

results.question: Which areas had the largest spread between their highest and lowest agriculture, forestry, fishing, and hunting weekly wage in 1990?
results.sql:
WITH yearly_wages AS (
  SELECT
    geoid,
    MAX(avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting) AS max_wage,
    MIN(avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting) AS min_wage
  FROM (
    SELECT geoid, avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting FROM t_1990_q1
    UNION ALL
    SELECT geoid, avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting FROM t_1990_q2
    UNION ALL
    SELECT geoid, avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting FROM t_1990_q3
    UNION ALL
    SELECT geoid, avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting FROM t_1990_q4
  )
  GROUP BY geoid
),
spread_calc AS (
  SELECT
    geoid,
    (max_wage - min_wage) AS spread
  FROM yearly_wages
)
SELECT geoid
FROM spread_calc
ORDER BY spread DESC
LIMIT 1

results.question: Which areas had their agriculture, forestry, fishing, and hunting establishment counts below the yearly average in every quarter of 1990?
results.sql:
SELECT area_fips
FROM (
    SELECT 
        t1.area_fips,
        t1.qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting AS q1_estabs,
        t2.qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting AS q2_estabs,
        t3.qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting AS q3_estabs,
        t4.qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting AS q4_estabs,
        (t1.qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting + 
         t2.qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting + 
         t3.qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting + 
         t4.qtrly_estabs_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting) / 4.0 AS yearly_avg
    FROM t_1990_q1 t1
    JOIN t_1990_q2 t2 ON t1.area_fips = t2.area_fips AND t1.geoid = t2.geoid
    JOIN t_1990_q3 t3 ON t1.area_fips = t3.area_fips AND t1.geoid = t3.geoid
    JOIN t_1990_q4 t4 ON t1.area_fips = t4.area_fips AND t1.geoid = t4.geoid
)
WHERE q1_estabs < yearly_avg
  AND q2_estabs < yearly_avg
  AND q3_estabs < yearly_avg
  AND q4_estabs < yearly_avg
GROUP BY area_fips

results.question: Which areas had the top 10 agriculture, forestry, fishing, and hunting wage increases from 1990 Q1 to 1994 Q1?
results.sql:
SELECT geoid
FROM (
    SELECT
        t1990.geoid,
        (t1994.avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting - t1990.avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting) AS wage_increase,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY (t1994.avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting - t1990.avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting) DESC) AS rn
    FROM t_1990_q1 t1990
    JOIN t_1994_q1 t1994 ON t1990.geoid = t1994.geoid
    WHERE t1990.avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting IS NOT NULL
      AND t1994.avg_wkly_wage_11_agriculture_forestry_fishing_and_hunting IS NOT NULL
)
WHERE rn <= 10
